leadText: Mienshao (Japanese: コジョンド Kojondo) is a Fighting-type Pokémon introduced in Generation V. It evolves from Mienfoo starting at level 50.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Mienshao is a white, long-bodied mustelid Pokémon with a small head and small, triangular ears. Its forehead has a purple spot adorning it as well as a yellow one on its snout. It has purple eyebrows that resemble eyelashes above its narrow maroon eyes, and it possesses a pair of long, yellow-tipped whiskers which have split ends. Its arms are almost completely covered by a large amount of fur that is tipped in purple and split at the end, resembling long sleeves. Its torso has one purple ring of fur around its midsection. It also has purple fur on the bottom section of the torso, which resembles pants, and its bottom paws are clawed. It has a long, skinny tail that, like its paw fur, is tipped purple and split at its end. Mienshao is respectful and is usually seen training with its Trainer. When facing a truly challenging opponent, Mienshao will bite off the fur from its arms to make itself lighter. Its arm fur is used as a weapon in battle and acts like a battle whip. Before it attacks, it lets out a bizarre wail. It then creates combination attacks that are difficult to see and overwhelmingly unstoppable, and slowly stores up power for a finishing blow. When using its blinding speed, Mienshao can crush massive boulders into tiny pieces. A New Perspective demonstrates that Mienshao can extend the fur on its arms at will and stretch it far enough to tie its opponents. Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Mienshao evolves from Mienfoo . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Mienfoo Fighting → First Evolution Mienshao Fighting

Generation V Unova B W : #126 Unova B2 W2 : #220 Black It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen. White They use the long fur on their arms as a whip to strike their opponents. Black 2 Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it launches into combo attacks that, once started, no one can stop. White 2 Generation VI Central Kalos #— Coastal Kalos #004 Mountain Kalos #— Hoenn #— X It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen. Y Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it launches into combo attacks that, once started, no one can stop. Omega Ruby It wields the fur on its arms like a whip. Its arm attacks come with such rapidity that they cannot even be seen. Generation VII Alola US UM : #360 Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Sun, Moon , Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee! . Ultra Sun It overwhelms its opponents with continuous attacks and then slowly stores up power before delivering the finishing blow. Ultra Moon When Mienshao lets out a bizarre wail, you're in danger. A flurry of kicks and chops too fast to see is about to be unleashed! Generation VIII Galar #— Isle of Armor #164 Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword When Mienshao comes across a truly challenging opponent, it will lighten itself by biting off the fur on its arms. Shield Delivered at blinding speeds, kicks from this Pokémon can shatter massive boulders into tiny pieces. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #138 Blueberry #— Lumiose #— Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Legends: Z-A . Scarlet When Mienshao lets out a bizarre wail, you're in danger. A flurry of kicks and chops too fast to see is about to be unleashed! Violet Using the long fur on its arms like whips, it launches into combo attacks that, once started, no one can stop. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry BW071 Mienshao Ash's Pokédex Mienshao, the Martial Arts Pokémon and the evolved form of Mienfoo. Mienshao's arm attacks are so fast they're almost invisible. It uses its long arm fur as a whip. Episode Pokémon Source Entry SM066 Mienshao Rotom Pokédex Mienshao, the Martial Arts Pokémon. A Fighting type. Mienshao uses the fur on its arms like whips. When it starts a series of attacks, nothing can stop it. Episode Pokémon Source Entry JN025 Mienshao Goh's Rotom Phone Mienshao, the Martial Arts Pokémon. A Fighting type. Mienshao uses the fur on its arms to attack at speeds too fast for the human eye to see.
